name: Deep multi-hop path (5+ intermediaries)
description: Tests deep graph traversal with 5+ hop path. Source has no direct trust to payment gateway sink. Based on the 13-hop path found in prod-discrepancy-nonv1-user-001. Validates OR-Tools scaling with deep paths and proper edge ordering across many nodes.
notes: Known to produce 13-hop path on staging. Tests deep graph traversal and edge ordering validation across many nodes.
